name: Planet Hollywood Cap'n Crunch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds chicken breast, cut into 1oz tenders
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grind or crush the Cap'n Crunch and cornflakes. Set aside.
2. Beat the egg with the milk. Set aside.
3. Stir together the flour, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Set aside.
4. Dip the chicken pieces into the seasoned flour mixture, coating well. Shake off excess flour.
5. Dip the chicken into the egg wash, coating well.
6. Dip the chicken into the Cap'n Crunch/Cornflakes mixture, coating well.
7. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet to 325°F (165°C).
8. Carefully drop coated chicken tenders into the hot oil.
9. Cook until golden brown and fully cooked, about 3 to 5 minutes depending on the size of the tenders.
10. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Serve immediately with Creole mustard sauce. Makes 8 servings.
